title: Extend _validate_run_state() with life_max + faction_rep_delta type checks
description: SPECIALIST-9 CHK-2: _validate_run_state() currently only checks biome (String), card_index (numeric), life_essence (numeric), anam_accumulated (now added P23). Missing: (1) life_max should be numeric >= 1. (2) faction_rep_delta should be Dictionary with all 5 faction keys. (3) cards_played should be numeric >= 0. Add typeof checks for life_max + cards_played. Add dict-has-key checks for faction_rep_delta (same pattern as _validate() faction loop). Keep _validate_run_state() < 50 lines.
notes: SPEC-2: Extended _validate_run_state() â€” added life_max (numeric >=1), cards_played (numeric >=0), faction_rep_delta (dict with all 5 factions). Function grows from 15 to 34 lines (< 50 limit). Validates SAVE-RUNSTATE-VALIDATE-EXTEND task description exactly.

title: Fix tick_cooldowns: only decrement active Ogham's cooldown (bible s.2.2)
description: SPEC-2 CHK-09 FAIL_MEDIUM: store_oghams.gd:78 tick_cooldowns() iterates ALL oghams in skill_cooldowns and decrements all. Bible s.2.2: 'Seul l'Ogham actif se recharge (cooldown diminue Ă  chaque carte). Les Oghams Ă©quipĂ©s mais inactifs ont leur cooldown en pause.' Fix: pass active_ogham key to tick_cooldowns(), only decrement if skill_id == active_ogham. Signature change: tick_cooldowns(state, active_ogham: String) â€” update call site in store_run.gd:170.
notes: IMPLEMENTED: store_oghams.gd tick_cooldowns(state, active_ogham:String='') â€” only ticks active ogham (bible s.2.2). use_ogham() sets active_this_card in state. store_run.gd:170 passes active_this_card. PAT-079 added: run_3d_controller has parallel local tracking.

title: Test: verify all active scene transitions reach existing .tscn files
description: Code-trace test for all 11 PixelTransition.transition_to() calls in the main flow. Verify: (1) each target .tscn exists, (2) each .tscn has an attached script, (3) no transition goes to a deprecated/archived path. Based on SPECIALIST-0 audit. Check: IntroCeltOSâ†’Menu3DPC, Menu3DPCâ†’HubAntre, Menu3DPCâ†’ParchmentPreRun, ParchmentPreRunâ†’BroceliandeForest3D, HubAntreâ†’TransitionBiome, TransitionBiomeâ†’BroceliandeForest3D, BroceliandeForest3Dâ†’MerlinGame, MerlinGameâ†’BroceliandeForest3D, BroceliandeForest3Dâ†’HubAntre, EndRunScreenâ†’HubAntre.
notes: TEST PASS: all 10 active scene transitions verified. All target .tscn exist with attached scripts. 3 WARNs: dual menu path (MenuPrincipalâ†’should be Menu3DPC, task FLOW-NARRATIVE-MENU-PATH-FIX added), MapMonde stub (low), TransitionBiome dead const (low). No FAIL_HIGH. Safe PixelTransition fallback pattern confirmed in parchment_pre_run + broceliande_forest_3d.

title: Fix neutre field: add GAMES[neutre] to registry OR map neutre â†’ esprit
description: merlin_constants.gd:338 FIELD_MINIGAMES has neutre:[apaisement,volonte]. MiniGameRegistry has no GAMES[neutre] â†’ falls back to chance field. If a card has field=neutre, wrong minigame type is played. Fix: add GAMES[neutre]=[mg_apaisement,mg_volonte] to minigame_registry.gd:21, and add esprit to MerlinMiniGameSystem.VALID_FIELDS fallback for neutre. Also add detect_field() case for neutre â†’ esprit.
notes: Fixed: (1) Added GAMES[neutre]=[mg_apaisement,mg_volonte] to minigame_registry.gd:29. (2) detect_field() gm_hint check now also accepts GAMES keys (FIELDS.has or GAMES.has) at line 76 â€” neutre hint now returned correctly. (3) Added neutre to VALID_FIELDS + case neutreâ†’_play_esprit(diff) in merlin_minigame_system.gd run():53.

title: Regression test: select_minigame('unknown') returns valid field name
description: Verify BUG-MG-APAISEMENT-FALLBACK fix: select_minigame('nonexistent_field') must return MerlinConstants.ACTION_VERB_FALLBACK_FIELD ('esprit'). MerlinMiniGameSystem.run('esprit', 5) must not fall to _play_generic(). Also verify pick_minigame_for_field('unknown') returns 'esprit'. Check test_effect_engine.gd test_pick_minigame_unknown_fallback() passes.
notes: PASS: 7/7 invariants verified. select_minigame(unknown)=esprit valid, neutreâ†’detect_fieldâ†’GAMES fallback all working. No bugs found. See T-MG-APAISEMENT-FALLBACK-VERIFY-2026-04-14.json

title: Add faction ending trigger to check_run_end (bible s.3.8: rep >= 80)
description: SPEC-2 CHK-12 FAIL_HIGH: store_run.gd:202 check_run_end() never checks if any faction has rep >= 80 for ending trigger. FACTION_THRESHOLD_ENDING=80 defined in constants but unused. Bible s.3.8: 'Faction â‰Ą 80 en fin de scenario â†’ Fin de faction disponible'. Fix: in check_run_end(), when scenario ends (victory or hard_max or cards>=soft_max), check if any faction_rep >= 80 and add faction_ending list to return dict. Complement with FACTION-ENDING-UNLOCK-CHECK test [19].
notes: Added faction_endings_available to all 3 ending return dicts in check_run_end(). Uses MerlinReputationSystem.get_available_endings(faction_rep) per bible s.3.8. Faction rep from state.meta.faction_rep at run end.
